summary: feat(podcastindex): add workflow find-appearances + auth set-secret; demote search-byperson
reason: Dogfooding the CLI to find a person's podcast appearances surfaced three frictions: (1) no first-class command for the proven byterm(show)->episodes-byfeedid->filter chain, so every caller re-derives it; (2) find search-byperson is the obvious-but-wrong path (PodcastIndex byperson fuzzy-matches the first name and is tag-dependent, so it is noisy on common names and misses untagged guests) yet help steered users to it; (3) the signing secret could not be persisted ergonomically (auth set-token saves only the key; auth setup's help wrongly claimed the secret cannot live in config, though PodcastindexSecret() already falls back to client_secret).
validated_outcome: publish validate passed; `workflow find-appearances --match "Arthur Mensch" --show "Big Technology"` surfaces feed 197340's episode that find search-byperson misses; `auth set-secret` persists client_secret so a non-interactive run authenticates without PODCASTINDEX_SECRET in env.

deferred_to_upstream.feature: Episode-content / guest search at the API layer
deferred_to_upstream.reason: PodcastIndex has no episode-content search; its only search endpoints (search/byterm, search/bytitle, search/byperson, search/music/byterm) index feed metadata or person tags. find-appearances therefore requires the show context (supplied by an upstream web search) and cannot discover an untagged guest from a name alone. This is an API capability gap, not fixable in the printed CLI; nothing for the generator to learn.
